Stefanos Kanellos.title: Stefanos Kanellos
Stefanos Kanellos.extract: Stefanos Kanellos was a Greek scholar, revolutionary and member of the Filiki Eteria of the early 19th century.

Shadows of the Orient.title: Shadows of the Orient
Shadows of the Orient.extract: Shadows of the Orient is a 1935 American crime drama film directed by Burt P. Lynwood.
